category_sources: source_facts.description says rpcsvc-proto provides rpcsvc protocol definitions from glibc and ships rpcgen.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives rpcsvc-proto; official repository uses the same name.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is the primary documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/thkukuk/rpcsvc-proto, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies rpcsvc protocol definitions from glibc; source_facts.executables lists rpcgen.
